steps.title: Distribute to both terms
steps.content:
Multiply $6xy$ by each term inside the parentheses. Keep both variables attached to the outside factor during distribution, so no $x$ or $y$ factor gets dropped.
$$6xy(3x^2)+6xy(5y)$$

steps.title: Simplify each product
steps.content: Multiply coefficients and add exponents for matching variables. The first product has three factors of $x$ and one factor of $y$; the second has one factor of $x$ and two factors of $y$. $$18x^3y+30xy^2$$ The answer is D.
